# jsonfile_quote (Resource)

Quote

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jsonfile_quote" "jurassic_park" {
    author = "John Hammond"
    message = "J'ai dépensé sans compter !"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `message` (String) Message of the quote

### Optional

- `author` (String) Who said the quote

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the quote
